title: Cosmos SDK cosmos.mint.v1beta1 Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions for the cosmos.mint.v1beta1 module of the Cosmos SDK gRPC-gateway REST API.

inflationRateChange.title: maximum annual change in inflation rate

maxSupply.description:
maximum supply for the token.

A value of "0" indicates an unlimited (infinite) maximum supply.

cosmos.mint.v1beta1.Params.description: Params defines the parameters for the x/mint module.

annualProvisions.description: annual_provisions is the current minting annual provisions value.

cosmos.mint.v1beta1.QueryAnnualProvision.description:
QueryAnnualProvisionsResponse is the response type for the
Query/AnnualProvisions RPC method.

inflation.description: inflation is the current minting inflation value.

cosmos.mint.v1beta1.QueryInflationRespon.description:
QueryInflationResponse is the response type for the Query/Inflation RPC
method.

params.description: params defines the parameters of the module.

inflationRateChange.title: maximum annual change in inflation rate

maxSupply.description:
maximum supply for the token.

A value of "0" indicates an unlimited (infinite) maximum supply.

cosmos.mint.v1beta1.QueryParamsResponse.description: QueryParamsResponse is the response type for the Query/Params RPC method.
